prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `4e469f39`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `4e469f39`. The rule is: for each gray hollow U-frame with one missing top cell, fill the gap plus the interior with red, then draw a red line on the row above from the gap column toward the side with the longer top segment. The Sonnet summary had no entry; the Opus summary matched the official examples, so I used it. No new primitive was needed.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_4e469f39/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_4e469f39/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_4e469f39/generator.py#L1). The generator stays close to the observed family: 10x10 grids, no noise, one or two gray 4-wide U-frames of heights 3-5, and row-disjoint output bands so one frame’s red line does not visually interfere with another.

Validation passed end to end: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 4e469f39` passed `4/4` official examples, `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 4e469f39 --n-examples 1000` built the artifacts, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 4e469f39` passed `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/4e469f39/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/4e469f39/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/4e469f39/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/4e469f39/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/4e469f39/previews/preview_03.png).
